  ...t,

  propertyId: p.id
})));
_c2 = INITIAL_TENANTS_ALL;
export const MONTHS_LABELS = ['Jan', 'Feb', 'Mar', 'Apr', 'May', 'Jun'];
export const PAYMENT_METHODS = ['UPI', 'Credit Card', 'Debit Card', 'Net Banking', 'NEFT'];
export const MAINTENANCE_CATS = ['Electrical', 'Plumbing', 'Wi-Fi', 'Cleaning', 'Renovation', 'Other'];
export const ROOM_TYPES = ['1BHK', '2BHK', '3BHK', 'Studio', 'PG Room', 'PG Room (AC)', 'Shop', 'Office', 'Villa'];
export const ROOM_STATUSES = ['Vacant', 'Occupied', 'Reserved', 'Under Maintenance', 'Cleaning'];
export const PROP_TYPES = ['Homes / Apartments', 'PG / Hostel', 'Commercial', 'Villa', 'Mixed Use'];
var _c, _c2;
$RefreshReg$(_c, "INITIAL_TENANTS_ALL$INITIAL_PROPERTIES.flatMap");
$RefreshReg$(_c2, "INITIAL_TENANTS_ALL");
